ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "rating_numerator" INTEGER /* Numerator for the rating given to the tweet */,
  "rating_denominator" INTEGER /* Denominator for the rating given to the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the tweet was posted */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the tweet was posted */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the tweet was posted */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the tweet's lifecycle */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tweet was posted */,
  "num_images" INTEGER /* Number of images in the tweet */,
  "num_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the tweet */,
  "num_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the tweet */,
  "num_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the tweet */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* User's birthdate */,
  "total_posts" INTEGER /* Total number of posts by the user */,
  "total_followers" INTEGER /* Total number of followers */,
  "total_following" INTEGER /* Total number of users the user is following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "img_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet associated with the image */,
  "img_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "img_num" INTEGER /* Image number in case of multiple images in a tweet */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image file in bytes */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image is flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("img_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breeds" (
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breed */,
  "breed_name" TEXT /* Name of the breed */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the animal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the breed */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the breed based on user interactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breed_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "img_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being analyzed */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the breed predicted */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the breed prediction */,
  "is_dog" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the predicted breed is a dog */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the prediction has been confirmed by a user or admin */,
  "confirmed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user or admin who confirmed the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breed_predictions_img_id FOREIGN KEY ("img_id") REFERENCES images ("img_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breed_predictions_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breed_predictions_confirmed_by FOREIGN KEY ("confirmed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating is flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet associated with the hashtag */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "is_popular" INTEGER /* Indicates if the hashtag is popular */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the hashtag based on usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who engaged */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., like, share) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of engagement */,
  "engagement_value" INTEGER /* Value of the engagement (e.g., 1 for like, 2 for share) */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the engagement is flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to this role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, member) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
